title: aegilops peregrina var. aristata
intro: Aegilops peregrina var. aristata, also known as Aegilops aristata, is a plant species of the genus Aegilops, commonly referred to as a type of wild grass or wheat. The medicinal properties of Aegilops aristata include its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its high silica content and other active compounds. The health benefits associated with this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Aegilops aristata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule supplement.
